marketName: Data Processing, Hosting, and Related Services
coreJobStatement: Deliver continuous, secure, and compliant compute, storage, and network capacity to tenants and end users at contracted uptime and performance levels.

l6Systems.name: Power Supply & Conditioning
l6Systems.jobFamily: Transform and condition utility power to IT-grade uninterruptible supply at N+1 or 2N redundancy

l6Systems.name: Cooling & Thermal Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain IT equipment within operating temperature and humidity limits across all load densities

l6Systems.name: Physical Infrastructure
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide secure, structured rack space, cabling, and floor systems for tenant equipment

l6Systems.name: Physical Security & Access Control
l6Systems.jobFamily: Control, monitor, and log physical access to all facility zones (perimeter → cage → rack)

l6Systems.name: Network Connectivity & Cross-Connect
l6Systems.jobFamily: Terminate diverse carrier connections; enable tenant-to-tenant and tenant-to-carrier cross-connects

l6Systems.name: IT Infrastructure Operations
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deploy, operate, and monitor compute, storage, and network equipment for managed workloads
